video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Ari Moonvale a feminine young adult frontline adventurer in a short guild cloak and reinforced leather armor and Ari Brightford a masculine guild crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron with a brass tool belt; Ari Moonvale steadies a shield on the workbench while Ari Brightford guides a safe repair tool, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark, consistent lighting and camera angle.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, Ari Moonvale and Ari Brightford remain in position; Ari Brightford taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Ari Moonvale holds the shield steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark, consistent character appearance and room mood.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and cooperative, focusing on a guild-related repair task. No sexual content, violence, or inappropriate themes are present. All visual elements adhere to the requested fantasy RPG aesthetic.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Ari Moonvale needs her frontline gear maintained for the upcoming goblin scouting mission, and Ari Brightford is the guild's expert crafter.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Appreciates the expert repair work for her gear.
Values the frontline adventurer's cooperation in the workshop.
